meta.description: TASK-091 · Receives onboarding wizard answers, classifies lane, upserts workspace_intake, and triggers workspace provisioning.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "workspace_id": "{{ $json.workspace_id }}",
  "user_id": "{{ $json.user_id }}",
  "full_name": {{ $json.full_name ? JSON.stringify($json.full_name) : 'null' }},
  "idea": {{ JSON.stringify($json.idea) }},
  "stage": {{ JSON.stringify($json.stage) }},
  "challenge": {{ JSON.stringify($json.challenge) }},
  "lane": {{ JSON.stringify($json.lane) }},
  "raw_answers": {{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_answers) }},
  "completed": true,
  "completed_at": "{{ $json.now }}"
}
